# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository documents defensive cybersecurity techniques and is continuously updated.

## Reporting Security Issues

If you discover inaccurate information, outdated detection logic, or defensive guidance that should be corrected, please open a GitHub Issue.

Do not submit malicious code or offensive tooling.

This repository is intended for defensive cybersecurity education only.

## Responsible Disclosure

Please avoid publishing sensitive information or zero-day vulnerabilities within this repository.
